title: scuticaria salesiana
intro: Scuticaria salesiana, also known as Lycopus salesianus, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include being a natural expectorant and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Scuticaria salesiana include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Scuticaria salesiana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
